name: MARK GR Series
description: The MARK series, specifically the Grand Raid (GR), is the backbone of many professional and military fleets worldwide. Known as the 'quintessential' heavy-duty Zodiac, it has been refined over 40 years to provide a simple, rugged, and reliable platform for extreme conditions. Built with high-grade CSM/Neoprene fabric and reinforced throughout, the Grand Raid is designed for heavy payloads and easy maintenance. Its classic inflatable keel design offers reliable sea-keeping, making it the choice for everything from Jacques Cousteau’s explorations to modern-day fire and rescue operations.
features: Heavy-duty CSM / Neoprene (Hypalon) tube construction
Reinforced aluminum sectional floorboards
Patented intercommunicating valve system
Integrated over-pressure relief valves
Heavy-duty transom with stainless steel protection
Wrap-around lifelines and non-skid tube reinforcements
Inflatable keel for improved tracking
Reinforced rubbing strakes on keel and tubes
Dual self-bailing drains
Stowage bags for hull and floor components

variants.name: MK 2 GR
variants.description: Compact 4.20 m Grand Raid rated for 7 persons and 55 hp.

variants.name: MK 3 GR
variants.description: Classic 4.70 m Grand Raid rated for 10 persons and 65 hp.

name: MARK HD Series
description: The MARK HD line extends the proven MARK platform with Futura Commando speed-tube hull technology for higher payloads and twin-engine options on longer hulls.
features: Heavy-duty CSM / Neoprene (Hypalon) tube construction
Reinforced aluminum sectional floorboards
Patented intercommunicating valve system
Integrated over-pressure relief valves
Heavy-duty transom with stainless steel protection
Wrap-around lifelines and non-skid tube reinforcements
Inflatable keel for improved tracking
Reinforced rubbing strakes on keel and tubes
Dual self-bailing drains
Stowage bags for hull and floor components
Futura Commando hull with speed tubes
Twin outboard configurations on select models

name: Futura Commando Series (FC)
description: The Futura Commando (FC) range is the most recognizable military boat in the world, used by elite Special Forces and Commandos across all theaters of operation. Its defining characteristic is the patented Futura hull, which uses two additional small 'speed tubes' underneath the main buoyancy tubes to lift the hull and reduce drag. This allows the FC range to plane heavy combat loads with smaller engines while providing unsurpassed maneuverability. Built with 'Duratane' fabric, these boats are field-repairable and support advanced deployment methods including Helidrop, Parachute Airdrop, and Underwater Caching.
features: Patented Futura hull with lateral 'speed tube' stabilizers
Military-grade 1880 dtx CSM / Neoprene fabric
Multiple floor options: Aluminum rigid, Slatted roll-up, or HPP (High Pressure)
CO2 or SCUBA bottle fast-inflation system
Underwater Caching capability for covert operations
Compatible with Helidrop and Parachute Airdrop
13 interior large tie-down D-rings for gear security
Reinforced plywood transom with bottom-edge protection
Multi-chambered hull for combat survivability
Standard NATO codification for allied fleet compatibility

variants.description: Compact 4.20 m combat inflatable (rigid floor configuration).

name: ERB Series
description: The Emergency Response Boat (ERB) range provides rapid-deploy rescue inflatables with fast-inflation capability and multiple floor options for surf and flood response.
features: Fast inflation capability
V-hull inflatable design
Rigid, roll-up, and HPP floor options
Compact folded stowage footprint

name: ZMSR Series
description: The ZMSR (Zodiac Milpro Surf Rescue) is engineered for surf and beach rescue with a compact V-hull inflatable platform.
features: V-hull inflatable design
Compact folded stowage
Surf rescue optimized geometry

variants.name: ZMSR 380
variants.description: 3.81 m surf rescue inflatable rated for 6 persons and 30 hp.

name: SRR Series (Sea RIB Responder)
description: The Sea RIB (SR) series, also known as the SRR (Sea RIB Responder) range, is a line of high-performance rigid inflatable boats specifically evolved for military and professional intervention. Built on a proven fiberglass hull with a deep-V design, these boats are engineered to be simple, functional, and exceptionally tough. A hallmark of the SR series is its removable 'slide-on' tube system, which significantly simplifies maintenance and allows for rapid collar replacement in the field. The decks are self-draining and feature integrated high-capacity fuel tanks and under-deck cable paths, providing a clean, unobstructed workspace for search and rescue, law enforcement, and naval operations.
features: Removable slide-on buoyancy tube system
Military-grade 1670 dtx or 1880 dtx CSM/Neoprene fabric
Self-draining deck with integrated non-skid surface
Large capacity under-deck fuel tanks with access hatches
Integrated cable paths for clean deck installations
Molded bow box and aft motor well storage
Heavy-duty towing and lifting brackets (bow and transom)
Intercommunicating inflation valves
Optional self-righting frames and navigation roll-bars
Water ballast system on certain models (e.g., SR-5.4) for stationary stability

description: The SRMN (Sea RIB Military Naval) is Zodiac Milpro's original rigid inflatable line — tough, simple, and functional for day-to-day military and professional missions.

Removable slide-on tube system
Self-draining deck
Military-grade CSM/Neoprene tubes

name: SRA Series (Sea RIB Aluminum)
description: The Sea RIB Aluminum (SRA) range is built for the most demanding professional and military environments where extreme durability and modularity are required. Featuring a marine-grade 5083 aluminum deep-V hull, the SRA series is capable of withstanding harsh coastal and riverine conditions while maintaining high speeds. A standout innovation of the SRA range is the choice between standard round collars or 'D-shape' collar technology, the latter of which significantly increases useable deck area. The deck itself integrates a modular track system, allowing for rapid reconfiguration of seating, consoles, and mission-specific equipment (such as gun mounts or dive doors) to suit various operational roles.
features: Marine-grade 5083 aluminum alloy Deep-V hull
Available with D-shape collar technology for increased deck space
Modular deck track system for rapid mission reconfiguration
Slide-on removable tube system in CSM/Neoprene
Integrated under-deck fuel tanks fore and aft
Reinforced vertical knees for hull strength
Open deck or roofed console options
Specialized mission equipment: gun posts, dive doors, and rescue cradles
Diver door options for easy water access and recovery
Durable non-skid aluminum flooring

name: Zodiac Hurricane Series
description: Zodiac Hurricane (ZH) boats are customizable high-end RIBs built for the most extreme maritime tasks, from 6 to 16 m with aluminum or composite hulls and multiple propulsion options.
features: Aluminium or composite hull options
Custom build lengths from 6 to 16 m
Outboard, inboard, sterndrive, surface drive, or waterjet
Up to 70 knot capability

construction.material: Aluminum or Composite Hull / CSM (Hypalon) Tubes

variants.name: ZH Custom
variants.description: Custom-configured Zodiac Hurricane built to mission requirements; contact Zodiac Milpro for specifications.
